content.en:
"Everyone, I'm sorry, this True Dragon Realm Ruin Order belongs to me!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

According to the rules, whoever grabs the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order will belong to whomever it is.

Maybe there is a Heavenly Ancestor who will not follow the rules, but the premise is that he must have the strength to kill Ye Tian, otherwise he will definitely not make trouble.

Subsequently, these Heavenly Ancestors left one by one.

The True Night Ancestor was very unconvinced, and left directly with a cold snort.

"Endless Ancestor, congratulations, you really relied on your strength to snatch it this time, the last time I obtained the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order, it was all luck!"

"I'm a little lucky, too!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently, he asked the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor about the situation inside the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

After all, he was going to go in and have a look later.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor didn't hide anything, and revealed: "Endless Great Ancestor, there are no weak creatures in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and the weakest ones are comparable to the weaker Heavenly Ancestors. Of course, the cubs of those powerful creatures don't count. In addition, the creatures in the True Dragon Realm Ruins are very rare, because it is difficult to breed creatures, and it is estimated that it is also related to the lack of origin of the True Dragon Realm Ruins. The resources of the True Dragon Realm Ruins are not much, but each resource is incomparably precious. The True Dragon Realm Ruins are similar to the terrain of the continent, and the area is naturally very small compared to the territory. However, after we entered the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, our strength was suppressed very strongly, and our perceptions were infinitely compressed. Therefore, even if it is a very small True Dragon Realm Ruin, after our strength is suppressed, it will look very vast. "

Ye Tian listened carefully, knowing more and more about the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

"Endless Great Ancestor, in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, the most important thing is not to provoke the True Dragon Clan. The true dragon clan in the True Dragon Realm Ruins is not the dragon clan in some small realms, the true dragons in the True Dragon Realm Ruins are very powerful, and each of them is equivalent to the top Heavenly Ancestor. The point is that there are a lot of true dragons, once you kill a true dragon, unless it is the strength of Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, you will die, and you will not even have a chance to escape from the ruins of the true dragon realm. Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor reminded.

True Dragons!

Ye Tian wrote it down!

In fact, the Heavenly Ancestors in the territorial waters of Wanlong come from many races, but those who belong to the dragon clan are really rare.

On the contrary, there are more humanoid races, and humanoid races are more suitable for cultivation.

Dragons are the food of powerful and immeasurable lifeforms in many realms, and their status is very low.

However, the true dragon of the True Dragon Realm Ruins was very terrifying, which really surprised Ye Tian.

"Endless Great Ancestor, this is the treasure book of the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and I have given it to you!"

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor took out a copy of the illustrated book and gave it to Ye Tian.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian accepted it.

......

this day.

Ye Tian was going to go to the True Dragon Realm Ruins, but it was true that he had barely made any progress now, so it was better to go to the True Dragon Realm Ruins to explore and see if there were any other opportunities.

So, he went to the True Dragon Realm Ruins alone without informing anyone.

To enter the True Dragon Realm Ruins, you only need to hold the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, and then urge the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, and you can cross the barrier of the True Dragon Realm Ruins and enter it.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body entered the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

"Come in!"

He found himself in the middle of a barren mountain, and the immeasurable will perception was compressed to a very small range, and he was really a little unaccustomed to it at first.

But soon, he got used to it.

"Whether it's the Great Ancestor or the Heavenly Ancestor, the destructive power here won't be too strong! If it's in the outside world, the Heavenly Ancestors can destroy the void as large as the True Dragon Realm Ruins with one hand!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he used his talent for copying, and the scope of the shroud was also very small.

"Fortunately, the scope of the copy talent is wider than the perception, so use the copy talent to spy on creatures that may be hidden!"

He moved forward slowly, not daring to be arrogant here.

He explored the barren mountain area and found no resources.

If it weren't for the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor telling him that the resources of the True Dragon Realm Ruins were scarce, otherwise he would really think that he had come to the wrong place!

"Go somewhere else!"

Ye Tian left this barren mountain and continued to explore along the way.

Time passed slowly, and the day he finally made a discovery.

"Dragon's Whisker Thunder Tree!"

This tree is very rare, and it constantly releases terrifying thunder and lightning, forming whiskers, hence the name.

This thunderbolt is not an ordinary thunderbolt, it is equivalent to the power of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform to cast the thunder system polar domain technique, if the ordinary fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform touches these thunderbolts, it will be directly seriously injured or even killed.

Of course.

To the Heavenly Ancestors, these thunderbolts were nothing more than tickling.

The function of the Dragon Whisker Thunder Tree is to refine the Dragon Whisker Thunder Liquid, which is also a resource, which has the effect of refining the body of the Heavenly Ancestors.

For Ye Tian, it was also a bit useful, at least it could slowly temper the boundary-breaking level body and slightly increase the strength of the slightest.

Alternatively, you can trade it for Dragonbeard Thunder Liquid.

"Any resource in the True Dragon Realm Ruins is extremely precious and rare, so almost all of them are protected by living beings. Some creatures occupy several treasure places, and they don't have time to guard them all, and they will also leave the means, once other strong people take the treasures, they will sense it, and then come to chase and kill!"

This is the experience that the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor told him.

He had just used his Replication talent to probe, and it was true that there were no creatures in the vicinity, but this Dragonbeard Thunder Tree had traces of being refined.

As long as a little bit of Dragon Whisker Thunder Liquid is refined each time, it will not die, and it can be continuously refined.

In a place like the True Dragon Realm Ruins, there are too few resources, so the creatures here will not take the resources all at once, which will lead to the starvation of resources.

It can be said that the foreign Heavenly Ancestors will be directly uprooted, which can be said to be very shameless, but Ye Tian will also do this, after all, he is not the original creature of the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

"No matter, just take it away!"

Ye Tian came to the Dragon Whisker Thunder Tree, cast the Sky Killing Blade, and struck at the bottom of the Dragon Whisker Thunder Tree.

Click!!

The Dragonbeard Thunder Tree was cut off with a single blow, but an inexplicable force shattered and spread into the distance.

"Sure enough, a creature has marked this dragon beard thunder tree!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After he put away the dragon's beard thunder tree, he quickly left.

He didn't want to fight any of the creatures here, it didn't make sense.

However.

That creature didn't seem to be far from here, and in the blink of an eye, Ye Tian sensed that the other party was coming.

It was a giant serpent, red all over, with dense eyes.

"The Snake with Ten Thousand Eyes!"

This is the name of this giant serpent.

And judging from its aura, it has reached the Heavenly Ancestor level.
